dashboard.label: NeuralWatch — AI Fleet Observatory
dashboard.description: Module C: Real-time cost, latency, tokens and error tracking across your LLM fleet.

search.query: index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | stats count as total_calls
index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | stats sum(cost_usd) as total_cost | eval total_cost="$" . tostring(round(total_cost,2))
index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | stats dc(model) as active_models
index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | stats sum(input_tokens) as total_input, sum(output_tokens) as total_output | eval total=total_input+total_output | fields total
index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | timechart span=1h count by model
index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | stats sum(cost_usd) as total_cost by team | sort -total_cost
index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | stats p50(latency_ms) as p50, p95(latency_ms) as p95, p99(latency_ms) as p99, count as calls by model | sort -p99

index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | stats count as total, sum(eval(if(status="error",1,0))) as errors by service | eval error_rate=round(errors/total*100,2) | sort -error_rate | fields service, error_rate
index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | stats sum(input_tokens) as input_tokens, sum(output_tokens) as output_tokens by model | sort -input_tokens
index=neuralwatch_ai_calls sourcetype="nw:ai_call" | timechart span=1d sum(cost_usd) as daily_cost | predict daily_cost algorithm=LLP5 future_timespan=7 as forecast
